headline: 3 Reasons to Avoid MGM and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: MGM Resorts has had an impressive run over the past six months as its shares have beaten the S&P 500 by 23.5%. The stock now trades at $47.43, marking a 34.3% gain. This performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

headline: My Favorite 6%+ Yielding REITs For Retirement
summary: Three high-yield, investment-grade REITs are trading at massive discounts for a safe 6%+ retirement dividend yield. Click here to read our picks.
